name: @inventory/desktop
description: Ứng dụng quản lý kho desktop

scripts.build: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:main
scripts.build:main: tsup src/main/main.ts src/main/preload.ts --format cjs --platform node --out-dir dist/main --clean --external electron --external electron-squirrel-startup
scripts.dev: npm run build:main && concurrently -k -n RENDERER,MAIN,ELECTRON -c blue,yellow,magenta "vite" "tsup src/main/main.ts src/main/preload.ts --format cjs --platform node --out-dir dist/main --watch --external electron --external electron-squirrel-startup" "wait-on tcp:5173 file:dist/main/main.js && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron ."
